positive: A vibrant, maximalist cosmic mural illustration featuring stylized geometric constellations, bioluminescent lunar cycles, and minimalist deep-sea flora. The central composition must be highly detailed, incorporating clean lines and strong, contrasting silhouettes. Use a color palette dominated by deep indigo, emerald teal, warm gold accents, and luminous lavender. The style should blend Art Deco geometry with ethereal cosmic watercolor techniques, ensuring all elements are separated and graphic for optimal apparel print transfer. Centered and highly symmetrical for composition.
negative: blurry, low quality, grain, text, watermark, signature, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, faded, sepia, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, photorealistic, logo, celebrity, trademark
